caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a headset, appears in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower-left corner of the screen. He is positioned in a room with a Christmas tree and a framed jersey visible in the background, gesturing with his hands as he speaks into a microphone. The main focus of the screen is a gaming interface with a snowy, ice-themed background. At the top, the text "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" is displayed. A central graphic, appearing as a rectangular card with a stylized "U" or similar logo, is surrounded by a swirling blast of ice and snow particles. As the sequence progresses, the central card and the surrounding frost effect rapidly dissipate and fade away, leaving only the pale blue, textured icy background and the man in the corner. Small, partially obscured text reading "BACK" is visible at the bottom of the main screen.
